# xiaochen-skills

> xiaochen-skills is a Claude Code plugin marketplace bundling 14 personal automation skills for video production, content publishing, and knowledge management.

xiaochen-skills is a collection of Claude Code plugins built by a Chinese video creator and blogger (Chen Yu Xiaojin, handle: chenhuajinchj). It covers an end-to-end personal media workflow: fixing DaVinci Resolve subtitles, publishing to WeChat Official Accounts and Astro blogs, discovering YouTube topics, generating video thumbnails with real-person AI image synthesis, batch-exporting images via local Photoshop, and compiling an Obsidian knowledge vault. Each of the 14 plugins is self-contained and installs via a single `/plugin marketplace add` command.

## Documentation
- [README (English)](README.md): Full English documentation including skill table with triggers and dependencies, install instructions, FAQ, and comparison to alternatives.
- [中文文档 (README.zh-CN.md)](README.zh-CN.md): 完整中文文档，含技能列表、触发词、依赖说明、安装方法和常见问题。

## Links
- Repository: https://github.com/chenhuajinchj/xiaochen-skills
